nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 07:00
nodes.notes:
Runs 3h after API/scraper flows (04:00) to give processing time.
Sends one Telegram message with top 5 jobs discovered in the last 24h.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  j.job_title,
  c.name                                                    AS company_name,
  j.location,
  j.work_mode::text,
  j.priority::text,
  j.source_url,
  j.summary,
  COALESCE((ev.parsed_json->>'relevance_score')::int, 0)   AS relevance_score
FROM jobs j
JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = j.company_id
JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT parsed_json
  FROM job_events
  WHERE job_id = j.id
  ORDER BY created_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) ev ON TRUE
WHERE j.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND COALESCE((ev.parsed_json->>'relevance_score')::int, 0) >= 80
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC
LIMIT 5;

nodes.name: DB: Fetch TOP-5 Jobs
nodes.notes:
Fetches top 5 newly discovered jobs (created in last 24h) with relevance >= 80.
relevance_score lives in job_events.parsed_json — retrieved via LATERAL JOIN.

nodes.name: Format Digest Message
nodes.notes:
Aggregates all DB rows into one Telegram HTML message.
Returns [] if no qualifying jobs — silently stops the flow.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: $json.text, disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram: Send Digest
nodes.notes: Sends one consolidated message. disable_web_page_preview keeps it compact.
